title: Home Loan for Plots in Nagpur 2025 — Rates, Banks & How to Qualify
metaTitle: Home Loan for Plots in Nagpur 2025 | Up to 90% Finance | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Get up to 90% bank finance on NMRDA approved plots in Nagpur. Compare rates from SBI, HDFC, Axis Bank. Learn how to qualify and what documents you need.
author: Mahalaxmi Infra

content.text: A common myth among plot buyers is that banks don't finance land purchases. The reality in 2025 is very different — leading banks in Nagpur offer up to 90% loan-to-value on NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved residential plots. Here's everything you need to know.

content.heading: Which Banks Offer Plot Loans in Nagpur?
content.text: SBI, Bank of Maharashtra, Axis Bank, HDFC Bank, and Canara Bank all offer residential plot loans for NMRDA approved layouts in Nagpur. The loan is sanctioned against the plot value and is disbursed directly to the developer at the time of registration.

content.heading: Interest Rates in 2025
content.text: Current plot loan rates range from 8.5% to 9.5% per annum depending on your credit score and the bank. Public sector banks like SBI and Bank of Maharashtra tend to offer better rates for NMRDA/RERA approved projects. A CIBIL score above 750 gets you the best rates.

content.heading: How Much Loan Can You Get?
content.text: For NMRDA sanctioned and RERA approved plots, banks typically finance 75–90% of the registered value. For example, on a ₹30 Lakh plot, you could get ₹22.5–27 Lakh as a loan. EMIs start from approximately ₹18,000/month for a 20-year tenure on a ₹22 Lakh loan.

content.heading: Documents Required
content.text: You will need: KYC documents (Aadhaar, PAN), last 3 months' salary slips or 2 years' ITR for self-employed, bank statements for 6 months, the NMRDA layout plan, RERA certificate, and the agreement for sale. Mahalaxmi Infra provides all developer-side documents on the day of booking.

content.heading: How Mahalaxmi Infra Helps
content.text: Our team coordinates directly with bank representatives for site visits, valuation, and loan processing. We've successfully facilitated plot loans for hundreds of buyers and can recommend the right bank based on your profile.
Don't let finances hold you back from owning a plot in Nagpur. With 90% bank financing available on Mahalaxmi Infra projects, your EMI could be lower than your current rent.
